description: Four canonically Ally-keyword Zendikari Resistance cards branch-attach to the existing zendikari-resistance character node. Ondu Champion (BFZ-149) is a Minotaur-Warrior-Ally with Rally and a Gideon Jura flavor quote about the resistance army; Relief Captain (OGW-32) is a Kor-Knight-Ally with Support 3 (the OGW-resistance-coalition-aid keyword); Spawnbinder Mage (OGW-35) is a Human-Wizard-Ally with Cohort, depicting an allied mage restraining captured Eldrazi Spawn; Stoneforge Acolyte (OGW-38) is a Kor-Wizard-Ally with Cohort and the canonical Kor stone-forge tradition. All four are Wizards-canonical resistance-coalition member subtypes per Scryfall type_line + MTG Wiki Allies (mechanic) page. The wave-79 node was opened at the 6-anchor threshold with explicit `appears_on:` extension expectation; this resolves the wave-80-surfaced faction-cohort lag by routing the OGW common-and-uncommon resistance roster to its anchor without inventing new structural vocabulary.
citations: [Scryfall: type_line] — Ondu Champion: Creature - Minotaur Warrior Ally; Relief Captain: Creature - Kor Knight Ally; Spawnbinder Mage: Creature - Human Wizard Ally; Stoneforge Acolyte: Creature - Kor Wizard Ally
[Scryfall: oracle_text] — Rally + Support + Cohort keyword presence across all four cards
[MTG Wiki: Allies (mechanic)] — canonical reference for the BFZ-block Ally-resistance-coalition mechanical-tier framework that these subtypes belong to
[Scryfall: flavor_text] — Ondu Champion's Gideon-Jura-quote-on-resistance-coordination; Spawnbinder Mage's anti-Eldrazi-spawn-binding humor; Stoneforge Acolyte's Kor stone-forge-tradition flavor
[In-corpus precedent] — cards/_characters/zendikari-resistance.md commissioning text explicitly anticipates `appears_on:` extension as additional resistance-coalition cards land
other_candidates_considered: Eldrazi-side roster extension (Vile Aggregate BFZ-137, Eldrazi Aggressor OGW-95, Maw of Kozilek OGW-99) — clean branch-attach to [[eldrazi]] but the proportional lag is smaller (14->17 vs 6->10) and the resistance-side branch is the wave-79 node's primary extension surface. Surface for a follow-up Edgelord pass; same shape, same evidence basis (Eldrazi creature subtypes + Devoid + brood-lineage flavor / oracle text).

Rakdos Roustabout (RNA-198) + Judith flavor — could anchor a future rakdos-cult faction node alongside Spear Spewer + Carnival Hellsteed, but only one slate card hits that cohort; no node-creation case yet.

Rhythm of the Wild (RNA-201) + Domri Rade flavor — Domri is a planeswalker character not yet noded; would warrant a domri-rade solo character node when a depicted Domri card joins inventory. Today, single-card cohort is below threshold.

Simic Ascendancy (RNA-207) — Simic guild collective candidate, but single-card with unnamed figure and no other RNA Simic cards on the slate. Future faction node candidate parallel to azorius-senate / orzhov-syndicate.
Squad Captain (CMR-51) — generic white-soldier-tribal; no narrative-weight faction edge available.
Gallant Strike (DFT-13) + Terrin — new Aetherdrift-specific character with no other anchor cards; below sub-node threshold (zero corpus prints depicting Terrin directly).
Dracosaur Auxiliary (DFT-122) + Bonehoard Dracosaur (LCI-134) cross-print pair — only Dracosaur Auxiliary is in corpus (Bonehoard absent from inventory); below 1:1-edge endpoint requirement.
prose_pattern_observations: Pattern (NOT graduated to vocabulary): both BFZ + OGW common-uncommon resistance-roster slices are now branching to the same faction parent at roughly the rate Wizards designed the Ally-resistance cycle. Across BFZ + OGW + ZNR (twelve corpus cards), the Ally-keyword + Rally + Support + Cohort + Convergence mechanical-tier cluster all routes to one anchor without further nodes. The faction-parent absorbs the within-block cohesion. Surfacing as prose observation, not as a graph object.
